name: Wuchang: Fallen Feathers (Eclipse perf)
post_apply_message: SAVE WARNING (exe-swap): this mod REPLACES the game executable, so the game's build changes. An existing save made on your installed build may be rejected as 'for another version'. Apply this BEFORE starting a save (or on a fresh save); if a save breaks, Revert restores your original exe and the save works again. Eclipse perf mod. Recommended Deck settings: v1 (67% res, like original) staged; v2 (75%, lower FPS) also in rar. 1280x800, TSR, minimum. Eclipse's tested Deck setup: GE-Proton (10-15+), TDP 18, GPU 1800, undervolt -50, SDWEAK. Mod targets a specific game build — if the game updates past it the modded exe can crash; Revert restores stock, then wait for a mod update. Files are NOT in git; stage into local-payloads first.
notes: Eclipse Steam Deck graphics-opt mod. Manifest-only on git; mod files (modified game exe/paks) live in local-payloads off git. Stage with tools/stage-eclipse.py, which copies the 'v1/For License/Wuchang Fallen Feathers' variant from the .rar into payload/mod/. Then Apply copies over the game dir, backing up replaced files.
